---
title: "Chaplet of Pearls, or, The White and Black Ribaumont, The. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Chaplet of Pearls, or, The White and Black Ribaumont, The. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

<i>Stray Pearls</i> and <i>The Release</i> are sequels to this novel.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
